# reference-patterns

> Personal reference of implementation and testing patterns across languages.
> Each pattern is a self-contained, runnable example documented in its PATTERN.md.

## Fullstack

- [connect-protovalidate-tanstack](https://github.com/Skayfa/reference-patterns/blob/main/fullstack/rpc/connect-protovalidate-tanstack/PATTERN.md): End-to-end typed RPC with a single validation source — protovalidate rules in the proto enforced by the Go server AND evaluated in the browser (protovalidate-es as a Standard Schema for TanStack Form), TanStack Query over HTTP GET for cacheable reads, and code-driven error handling caught at the right place (Suspense + error boundary for reads, server violations onto form fields via onSubmitAsync, transient-only retries, panic shield) — tested on both sides without a network

## Go

- [bounded-parallel-map](https://github.com/Skayfa/reference-patterns/blob/main/go/concurrency/bounded-parallel-map/PATTERN.md): Bounded parallel fan-out in Go — a generic Map with errgroup, context cancellation on first error, order-preserving results, and deterministic concurrency tests (no sleeps)
- [table-driven-tests](https://github.com/Skayfa/reference-patterns/blob/main/go/testing/table-driven-tests/PATTERN.md): Idiomatic Go table-driven tests — named map cases, parallel subtests, t.Helper assertion helpers

## Protobuf

- [buf-setup](https://github.com/Skayfa/reference-patterns/blob/main/protobuf/buf-setup/PATTERN.md): Minimal buf v2 setup — module layout, STANDARD lint, breaking-change detection, remote-plugin codegen

## Rust

- [ollama-tool-calling](https://github.com/Skayfa/reference-patterns/blob/main/rust/agent/ollama-tool-calling/PATTERN.md): A minimal AI agent with tool-calling in Rust against a local (free) Ollama model — the tool-use loop behind a trait, tested deterministically with a scripted mock (no network, no model)
- [verify-loop](https://github.com/Skayfa/reference-patterns/blob/main/rust/agent/verify-loop/PATTERN.md): Verify-then-retry combinator — check an output against ground truth, feed failures back and retry until it passes or a budget runs out; agent-agnostic, no dependencies
- [bm25-ranking](https://github.com/Skayfa/reference-patterns/blob/main/rust/retrieval/bm25-ranking/PATTERN.md): Lexical retrieval with BM25 in ~40 lines of std — chunk text, rank by relevance (IDF + length normalization), no embeddings, no dependencies

## TypeScript

- [pnpm-turbo-structure](https://github.com/Skayfa/reference-patterns/blob/main/typescript/monorepo/pnpm-turbo-structure/PATTERN.md): How to structure a pnpm + Turborepo monorepo — apps/packages/tooling split, shared configs as packages, task graph
- [react-call-confirm](https://github.com/Skayfa/reference-patterns/blob/main/typescript/react/react-call-confirm/PATTERN.md): Awaitable UI with react-call — a Confirm dialog you await like a function, and how to test promise-resolving components with Testing Library
- [vitest-unit-mocking](https://github.com/Skayfa/reference-patterns/blob/main/typescript/testing/vitest-unit-mocking/PATTERN.md): Unit testing with Vitest — module mocks (vi.mock), injected mocks (vi.fn), fixture builders and fake timers
